applicability: Applies to the three reported self-supporting square thermally grown SiO2 membrane configurations on silicon frames. Values must not be generalized to other membrane thicknesses, lateral dimensions, process histories, holders, or materials without validation.
method_summary: Published measurement results transcribed from membrane-profile observations and simulation-inferred residual-stress evaluation reported by Malhaire et al. No raw profile or simulation-inversion files are stored in this repository.
public_summary: Published source-documented measurements report central membrane deflection across three square side lengths and simulation-inferred compressive residual-stress estimates. These are not independent Diamond Thermal Lab measurements.
review_notes: Draft literature transcription pending final human review. This Evidence Object represents published measurement-derived data, not an independent Diamond Thermal Lab measurement.

source.reference: arXiv:2305.15794; C. Malhaire et al.; Determination of compressive stress in thin films using micro-machined buckled membranes; 2023; published measurement transcription

title: Literature-transcribed released SiO2 membrane deflection and simulation-inferred stress estimates
uncertainty_summary: Values and uncertainties are transcribed from the source. Deflection uncertainty is source-reported. Stress estimates are simulation-inferred from measured profiles and the source reports a method-level relative error below approximately 5 percent. The repository does not contain raw measurement or inversion files.
